arts.ttl: Frank Lampard reaches agreement with Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim - ‘Can see in his eyes' - CoventryLive
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim and Frank Lampard have spoken enthusiastically about Mason Mount's attitude - even as the Manchester United midfielder navigates through a difficult spell of injuries. He said: "I have this real professional drive and if I see something and I want to do it, I'll do it.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Frank Lampard have exact same opinion on struggling Man Utd star
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has had to contend without Mason Mount for much of his time at Manchester United as the ex-Chelsea star has been plagued with injuries since arriving at Old Trafford in 2023

arts.ttl: Ali Al-Hamadi's brilliant reaction to Stoke City chant and message to Tom Cannon
arts.sum: Maybe it's the way I play but for whatever reason I've always had a decent song from the fans, at Wimbledon and at Ipswich. I was so focused then when we went over to the fans at full-time I was still clapping not knowing what was going on then someone said, 'Do you know what they're singing?' and then whispered in my ear.

arts.ttl: Preview: Coventry City vs. Stoke City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Coventry City and Stoke City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
